text.title: Cron Automation for VPS Worked Example
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing inputs, the filled artefact, and the validator pass.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Operator runs Cron Automation for VPS on cadence; one named owner, three input artefacts, two open follow-ups from the prior cycle.

list.item: Named owner with role + escalation path.
Trigger event log (cron run or threshold breach).

section.title: Filled artefact (excerpt)
Validator trace
section.p: Running `python3 scripts/validate-cron-automation.py --file out.json` exits 0; running with the bad example exits 1 and prints VIOLATION lines per missing required field. `--self-test` exits 0 on both built-in fixtures.
